subcodes.first_line: Praise befitteth and is worthy of the Sovereign of existence and the King of the seen and unseen realms, Who hath brought forth the pearls of divine knowledge from the shell [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد سلطان وجود و ملیک غیب و شهود را لایق و سزاست که لئالی عرفان را از صدف
subcodes.subjects: @rejection of Muhammad, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @wisdom [hikmat], @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @Word of God and human limitations, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @personal instructions
